zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,於1255年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾時，他的父親Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo22歲，母親Laure Monfort D'epernon16歲。他於1293年與Ide de Beaumont-Meulan在法國布利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年7月21日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,于1255年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾时，他的父亲Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo22岁，母亲Laure Monfort D'epernon16岁。他于1293年与Ide de Beaumont-Meulan在法国布利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年7月21日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Comte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Jacques.
French:

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

variants.name: Lecomte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, was born in 1255, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo, was 22 and his mother, Laure Monfort D'epernon, was 16. He married Ide de Beaumont-Meulan in 1293, in Brie, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, est né en 1255, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Laure Monfort D'epernon, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Ide de Beaumont-Meulan en 1293, à Brie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, 1255 in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo 22 und seine Mutter Laure Monfort D'epernon 16. Er hat 1293 in Brie, Frankreich Ide de Beaumont-Meulan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1302 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, è nato il nel 1255 nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Laure Monfort D'epernon, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Ide de Beaumont-Meulan nel 1293, nel Brie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,が1255年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルで生まれた時，父Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledoは22歳，母Laure Monfort D'epernonは16歳であった。1293年にフランスブリーでIde de Beaumont-Meulanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年7月21日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,(이)가 1255년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Laure Monfort D'epernon(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1293년 프랑스 브리에서 Ide de Beaumont-Meulan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 7월 21일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리j크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, nasceu em 1255, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Laure Monfort D'epernon, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Ide de Beaumont-Meulan em 1293, em Brie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, родился в 1255 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Laure Monfort D'epernon, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Ide de Beaumont-Meulan в 1293 г. в местности бри, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, nació en 1255, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sancho Fernández, Arzobispo de Sevilla y de Toledo, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Laure Monfort D'epernon, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Ide de Beaumont-Meulan en 1293, en Brie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 47 años.
